data.title: Minerals Technologies Inc. Announces Second Quarter 2026 Conference Call on July 31, 2026
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Minerals Technologies Inc. (NYSE: MTX) made an announcement regarding the release of their second-quarter results for the period ending July 5, 2026. The company, a prominent specialty minerals firm driven by technology, is set to reveal these financial figures on July 30, 2026, following the close of the market. Subsequently, on July 31, a conference call is scheduled for 11 a.m. Eastern Time (ET) to delve into the details of these results.

data.title: Bassmaster unveils 2026 100 Best Bass Lakes rankings, celebrating America's greatest fisheries during America250
data.description: Bassmaster Magazine is recognizing America's exceptional bass fisheries as the country marks its 250th birthday. The publication has unveiled its latest rankings of the top 100 Best Bass Lakes, highlighting the finest waters for bass fishing enthusiasts. This announcement comes as the United States commemorates its significant milestone, showcasing the nation's impressive natural resources and captivating outdoor recreational opportunities.

data.title: TripleLift Sees Record Breaking Results for Prime Day 2026 as Offsite Commerce Media Reaches Inflection Point
data.description: Recently released data on a global scale reveals that advertisers are approaching Amazon's major summer sale as more than just a retail opportunity, treating it as a strategic media event. Sixty-one percent of the total spending during this sale originated from sectors that are not typically associated with shopping. The findings were unveiled in New York on July 2, 2026, through exclusive data provided by TripleLift.

data.title: DoubleLine Paper on IG Corporate Bond Sector's Heavy Exposure to AI Capex
data.description: On July 2, 2026 in Tampa, Florida, Corporate Credit Portfolio Manager Mariya Entina from DoubleLine highlighted in a research paper the significant increase in AI infrastructure capital expenditure. This surge, visible in select high-performing stocks, is deemed an underestimated risk among investment opportunities.

data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of July 2, 2026, a recent report by Mordor Intelligence projects significant growth in the explosive trace detection market. The market size is anticipated to increase from USD 1.85 billion in 2026 to USD 2.72 billion by 2031, reflecting a notable CAGR of 8.06%. data.title: Hopper Named to Newsweek's List of America's Best Online Platforms for 2026
data.description: Hopper has been acknowledged as one of the leading online platforms for excellence and reliability in the Travel & Tourism sector. The recognition came in July 2, 2026, placing Hopper on Newsweek's first-ever roster of America's Best Online Platforms for the year 2026 within the Travel & Tourism domain. This accolade highlights Hopper's commitment to providing top-notch services in the industry.

data.title: Rubrik is Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™
data.description: Rubrik, a leading security and AI operations company based in Palo Alto, California, has been recognized as a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Backup and Data Protection Platforms. This marks the seventh year in a row that Rubrik has received this recognition. The company has been positioned furthest in Vision among its competitors. Rubrik's focus on delivering cyber resilience to protect organizations from advanced threats has been validated through this acknowledgement. The company aims to safeguard organizations from cyber threats and autonomous agent overreach. Twelve years ago, Rubrik was established with a commitment to enhancing cybersecurity measures.

data.title: Aesthetic Surgery Journal Earns 4.2 Impact Factor; ASJ Open Forum Climbs to 2.3
data.description: GARDEN GROVE, Calif. - Aesthetic Surgery Journal (ASJ) and Plastic Surgery Journal retain their top positions as the leading journals in the field of aesthetic and plastic surgery. ASJ achieved an impressive increase in its Impact Factor, rising from 3.9 to 4.2. This accomplishment ranks ASJ 30th out of 321 surgery journals globally, solidifying its status as a prestigious publication in the industry.

data.title: Slipstream Expands Work Management and PMO Practice with Acquisition of Echolocity
data.description: In Blue Bell, Pennsylvania, Slipstream Life Sciences, a prominent technology consulting partner, has revealed the acquisition of Echolocity, a specialized consultancy in work and project management. Echolocity boasts over seven years of experience assisting organizations in enhancing clarity, aligning strategies with execution, and establishing conducive work environments. This acquisition signifies that clients now have access to a highly skilled work management and Project Management Office (PMO) team in the industry.

data.title: MITER Brands to Showcase Industry-Leading MI Windows and Doors and PGT Windows and Doors Products at the Southeast Building Conference (SEBC)
data.description: MITER Brands, a prominent group of window and door companies, is set to attend the Southeast Building Conference (SEBC) at the Orange County Convention Center in Orlando on July 29-30, 2026. MI Windows and Doors along with PGT Windows and Doors will be present at booth #215 to present a range of cutting-edge window and door options tailored for homeowners and industry experts across the Southeast region. SEBC is known as the biggest trade exhibition in the industry, drawing in a significant number of attendees each year.

data.title: Innoscience Secures Removal of Court-Enjoined Infineon GaN Products from Display at electronica China 2026
data.description: In Shanghai on July 2, 2026, Infineon Technologies had to take down specific gallium nitride (GaN) items from its display at electronica China 2026 following Innoscience's discovery that these products were under a Chinese court order restricting their showcase. The situation arose despite the growing popularity of GaN technology.

data.title: Mouser Electronics Honored with Top Global Distributor, Growth Awards from HARTING for Second Consecutive Year
data.description: In Dallas and Fort Worth, Texas, Mouser Electronics, a leading global distributor of electronic components and industrial automation products, has been awarded the Global High Service Distributor of the Year by HARTING. Along with this honor, Mouser was also recognized with the Distinguished Award for New Product Sales Growth. This marks the second year in a row that Mouser has received these esteemed awards. With a history dating back to 2003, Mouser continues to excel in providing exceptional service and driving sales growth in partnership with HARTING.
